label: Tuition as a formal category
english_desc: Tuition income from the Hall, noted per annum.

label: Academic prize awarded
english_desc: Prizes awarded for Castle and Bocardo (student prizes)

label: Gas lighting installed
english_desc: Arrears due from Mrs Betty relating to the previous year (reference to "magasins" unclear).

label: Mortgage transaction
english_desc: Payment to Mr Shippen of the remainder due on his mortgage.

label: Private tuition / students
english_desc: Payment to private Oxonians at Michaelmas.

label: 3% consols investment
english_desc: Instruction or note to purchase three percent stock (3% consols).

label: Exam moderator role emerges
english_desc: Signature of Ioh. De Grato, the Moderator.

label: Choir / choral service
english_desc: Choir stipend paid to Thiers.

label: Market-rate rents begin
english_desc: Annual rent received from the Kidlington estate (quit/rack rent).

label: Banking relationship formalised
english_desc: Sum received from bankers.

label: Oxford buys property insurance
english_desc: Insurance premium for barns and related buildings at Wittm (Witney).

label: Government taxes the college
english_desc: Payment of the college income tax (first three instalments).

label: Agricultural drainage works
english_desc: Payment to Meadowcraft for making a drain (work on drainage)

label: Industrial canal investment
english_desc: Canal dividend received (quarterly/generic canal dividend)

label: Loan income or payment
english_desc: Interest received on a loan relating to Whittonh rectory (interest due).

label: Widows fund / charity
english_desc: Payment to Mr French of Merton to correct an error in the widows' (or will) account.

label: Railway era arrives
english_desc: Sundry expenses (lighting, gold, fee for inducting railway plan, and repairs to stoves) related to the Rector (ditto)

label: First institutional deficit
english_desc: Deficit brought forward from 1857.

label: Composition fee income
english_desc: Composition fees paid to the Master.

label: Exhibition scholarships paid out
english_desc: Payment to the St. Richard's exhibitioner (scholarship recipient).

label: Students labelled 'undergraduates'
english_desc: Contributions from undergraduates towards the chapel mosaic.

label: Percentage-based accounting
english_desc: Commission or percentage fees paid.

label: Open competition for awards
english_desc: NOT FOUND
